---
title: "Boltzmann simulation"
description: "Particle-in-a-box (PIB) simulation written in C with C++ graphics animator. Uses event-driven programming."
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://github.com/pablo-mas/boltzmann-simulation
    affiliation: MSc student at ESPCI Paris - PSL
    affiliation-url: https://www.espci.psl.eu/en/
date: 05-13-2019
categories: [C, Thermodynamics, University project] # self-defined categories

image: boltzmann-simulation.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---
